allow: Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('lucide-react'\); const names = Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(k => /github|linkedin|twitter|facebook|x$/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\(names\);")
Bash(node -e "const icons = require\('react-icons/si'\); const names = Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(k => /github|linked|twitter|facebook|x$/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\(names.slice\(0,20\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const si = require\('react-icons/si'\); const fa6 = require\('react-icons/fa6'\); const siNames = Object.keys\(si\).filter\(k => /github|linked|facebook/i.test\(k\)\); const fa6Names = Object.keys\(fa6\).filter\(k => /github|linked|twitter|facebook|xtwitter/i.test\(k\)\); console.log\('si:', siNames.slice\(0,10\)\); console.log\('fa6:', fa6Names.slice\(0,10\)\);")
